title: Real Estate Financing
content:
## Real Estate Financing
Pioneering Canada's most sophisticated real estate financings
Lenders, borrowers and investors count on us to efficiently negotiate, structure and close their most important financing deals — every time.
As Canada’s pre-eminent lending practice, we have forged close relationships with all major national banks and lending institutions and have worked extensively with both foreign lenders and borrowers. Our team has decades of experience driving results on complex financing structures.

### Keen insight, extensive knowledge, unmatched expertise
Our experience spans every aspect of real estate financing from commercial, industrial and retail to multi-family residential, seniors housing, condominium, hotel, infrastructure and mixed-use property classes. Our lawyers provide full spectrum support for:
- public and private capital market financings;
- public and private bond financing;
- acquisition financing;
- construction financing;
- permanent/term financing;
- conventional mortgage lending;
In addition, our firm has exceptional strength in the financial services and real estate sectors, with both practices consistently ranked top-tier by leading national and international legal directories.
Comprehensive and collaborative guidance for your real estate financing.
- Tzen-Yi Goh Partner | Practice Group Leader, Real Property and Planning People.Offices.Singular Toronto
Partner | Practice Group Leader, Real Property and Planning
